content.text:
All done. Here is the summary:

## TASKS 8 & 9 COMPLETE

**Commit:** `a67e39e` - feat: add loyalty program and rewards CRUD in merchant dashboard

**6 files created:**

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `C:\Users\User\loyalty-app\apps\dashboard\src\components\program-form.tsx` | Client-side form for creating/editing loyalty programs (stamp or points type) |
| `C:\Users\User\loyalty-app\apps\dashboard\src\app\(dashboard)\programs\page.tsx` | Server-rendered programs list with cards showing name, type, status badge |
| `C:\Users\User\loyalty-app\apps\dashboard\src\app\(dashboard)\programs\new\page.tsx` | New program creation page wrapping ProgramForm |
| `C:\Users\User\loyalty-app\apps\dashboard\src\app\(dashboard)\programs\[id]\page.tsx` | Program detail/edit page with link to manage rewards |
| `C:\Users\User\loyalty-app\apps\dashboard\src\components\reward-form.tsx` | Client-side form for adding rewards (percentage, fixed, freebie discount types) |
| `C:\Users\User\loyalty-app\apps\dashboard\src\app\(dashboard)\programs\[id]\rewards\page.tsx` | Rewards management page with existing rewards list and add-reward form |

**Key implementation details:**

- **ProgramForm** supports both create and edit modes via optional `program` prop. It conditionally renders stamp goal or points-per-euro fields based on the selected type.
- **Programs list page** is a server component that queries `loyalty_programs` filtered by the current merchant. Programs display as clickable cards with active/inactive badges.
- **RewardForm** supports three discount types (percentage, fixed, freebie) and dynamically sets either `stamps_required` or `points_cost` based on the parent program's type.
- **Rewards page** uses a two-column layout: existing rewards on the left, add-reward form on the right.
- All server pages use the `@/lib/supabase/server` client; all client forms use `@/lib/supabase/client`.
- TypeScript type-checks pass cleanly with no errors.
